phenomenon_label: context switch latency increases after interruption
revision_reason: Create a public-safe fixture for unresolved pattern capture before hypothesis generation.

observed_pattern.description: A synthetic workflow model shows longer task-resumption latency after a forced context interruption than after a voluntary context switch.

operational_variables.name: resumption_latency_seconds
operational_variables.measurement_method: timestamp difference between interruption end and first valid action

alternative_explanations: Task complexity rather than interruption drives latency
falsification_route: If matched forced and voluntary switches show no latency difference across repeated synthetic runs, reject the candidate pattern.
next_executable_action: Generate a simulated event log and run a latency comparison harness.

revision_reason: Reject private material before public discovery memory.
